name: BB:DeviceDefinition: Database
notes: This rule defines all Databases on the system.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: Database on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Oracle RDBMS Audit Record, Microsoft SQL Server, Application Security DbProtect, IBM DB2, IBM Informix Audit, Oracle Audit Vault, Oracle Database Listener, Oracle Fine Grained Auditing, Sybase ASE
TD_list: APPLY BB:DeviceDefinition: Database on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Oracle RDBMS Audit Record, Microsoft SQL Server, Application Security DbProtect, IBM DB2, IBM Informix Audit, Oracle Audit Vault, Oracle Database Listener, Oracle Fine Grained Auditing, Sybase ASE
